category_sources: Official GitHub README says SandVault manages a limited user account to sandbox shell commands and AI agents.
source_facts.description: Run AI agents isolated in a sandboxed macOS user account.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses SandVault.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/webcoyote/sandvault; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include macos and sandbox.
source_facts.description identifies macOS sandboxed user isolation for AI agents.
source_facts.executables lists sv and related CLI commands.
